item.title: MarkWilsonRadio: Mark Wilson @MarkWilsonRadio · 1min And just like that, he’s gone. @hullfcofficial 1 21
item.description: Mark Wilson @MarkWilsonRadio · 1min And just like that, he’s gone. @hullfcofficial 1 21

item.title:
MarkWilsonRadio: Mark Wilson @MarkWilsonRadio · 3min Cartwright in tears live @SkySportsRL
“They are passionate fans here, the best I
item.description:
Mark Wilson @MarkWilsonRadio · 3min Cartwright in tears live @SkySportsRL
“They are passionate fans here, the best I’ve ever come across. The players gave it everything and they never gave up.”
All the players thanked him at the end and have all waited for him to finish his interview.
The end is nigh. 2 79

item.title: pistol147: Mark Allen @pistol147 · 3min And the winner is @Lev1474 who correctly guessed 69. We had 28 winning guesses across X,
item.description:
Mark Allen @pistol147 · 3min And the winner is @Lev1474 who correctly guessed 69. We had 28 winning guesses across X, Instagram and Facebook so @robbiecov1 done a random draw for me to decide
Please get in touch with Robbie who will sort your tickets and give you your hotel details for Saturday night. Enjoy Mostrar más 3 3 175

item.title: MarkWilsonRadio: Mark Wilson @MarkWilsonRadio · 5min Aidan Sezer re John Cartwright “I came to this club to play for John Cartwright. We
item.description:
Mark Wilson @MarkWilsonRadio · 5min Aidan Sezer re John Cartwright “I came to this club to play for John Cartwright. We all play for him and we all love him. Hopefully he will be here until the end of the season.”
Cartwright getting a great ovation from the @hullfcofficial fans at MKM Stadium. 2 2 139
